title: Universal Remote Control for Luxor Bush Digihome Finlux Smart TV - No Setup Required
features: MATCH TV MODELS: Universal remote control for all Luxor Bush Digihome Finlux smart tv.
NO SETUP NEEDED:No programming or setting required, You can just use the remote directly after inserting 2 X AAA Batteries (not supplied).
The buttons and functions are the same as the original remote control, it covers all the functions of the original remote control.

HIGH QUALITY:Made of high quality ABS with no smell,the lightweight and ergonomic design makes it very comfortable,and the buttons are soft and respond very sensitively.It's a perfect replacement remote control for your old or broken TV remote control.
If you have any problem with the item, please contact us, we will do our best to solve it.
description: Universal remote control for all Luxor Bush Digihome Finlux smart tvs. Just insert 2 X AAA Batteries (not supplied) and you can use it directly. Suitable for tv models: Suitable for all models of Luxor Bush Digihome Finlux smart tvs. Package Weight: approx. 60g Dimensions: 16 * 3 * 1 cm Remote Range: Around 10 Meters Battery Required: AAA x 2 (Not Included)
